name: KALTURA INC
summary: PARTI . Overview We, Kaltura, Inc. (Kaltura, we, us, or our), are a market-leading provider of video and rich media offerings for enterprises. Our mission is to power rich, agentic digital experiences across organizational journeys for customers, employees, learners, and audiences.
